mapper.sql: SELECT e.EMP_ID, e.EMP_NM, COALESCE(o.ORG_NM, e.ORG_CD) AS dept_nm, COALESCE(xp.CD_NM, e.POS_CD) AS position_nm, CASE e.IN_OFFI_YN WHEN 'Y' THEN '1' ELSE '3' END AS work_status FROM PHM_EMP_C e LEFT JOIN ORM_ORG_C o ON e.ORG_CD = o.ORG_CD AND o.END_YMD = '9999-12-31' LEFT JOIN XFRMD2C xp ON e.POS_CD = xp.CD AND xp.CD_KIND = 'PHM_POS_CD' AND xp.END_YMD = '9999-12-31' WHERE 1=1

SELECT e.EMP_ID, e.EMP_NO, e.EMP_NM, e.ENG_NM, e.CHI_NM, e.CTZ_NO, e.SEX_CD, e.BIRTH_YMD, e.IN_OFFI_YN, e.COMPANY_CD, e.ORG_CD, e.HIRE_YMD, e.ANNUAL_CAL_YMD, e.POS_GRD_CD, e.POS_CD, e.DUTY_CD, e.JOB_CD, e.REPREDUTY_CD, e.WORK_ORG_CD, e.FILE_NM, COALESCE(o.ORG_NM, e.ORG_CD) AS dept_nm, COALESCE(xco.CD_NM, e.COMPANY_CD) AS corp_nm, COALESCE(xp.CD_NM, e.POS_CD) AS pos_label, COALESCE(xd.CD_NM, e.DUTY_CD) AS duty_label, COALESCE(wo.ORG_NM, e.WORK_ORG_CD) AS work_so_nm FROM PHM_EMP_C e LEFT JOIN ORM_ORG_C o ON e.ORG_CD = o.ORG_CD AND o.END_YMD = '9999-12-31' LEFT JOIN XFRMD2C xco ON e.COMPANY_CD = xco.CD AND xco.CD_KIND = 'PHM_COMPANY_CD' AND xco.END_YMD = '9999-12-31' LEFT JOIN XFRMD2C xp ON e.POS_CD = xp.CD AND xp.CD_KIND = 'PHM_POS_CD' AND xp.END_YMD = '9999-12-31' LEFT JOIN XFRMD2C xd ON e.DUTY_CD = xd.CD AND xd.CD_KIND = 'PHM_CALL_CD' AND xd.END_YMD = '9999-12-31' LEFT JOIN ORM_ORG_C wo ON e.WORK_ORG_CD = wo.ORG_CD AND wo.END_YMD = '9999-12-31' WHERE e.EMP_ID = ?

INSERT INTO PHM_EMP_C (EMP_ID, COMPANY_CD, EMP_NO, EMP_NM, ENG_NM, CHI_NM, CTZ_NO, IN_OFFI_YN, SEX_CD, BIRTH_YMD, HIRE_YMD, ANNUAL_CAL_YMD, POS_CD, DUTY_CD, JOB_CD, REPREDUTY_CD, WORK_ORG_CD, MOD_USER_ID, MOD_DATE) VALUES (?, 'D001', ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 1, CURDATE()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE EMP_NM = VALUES(EMP_NM), ENG_NM = VALUES(ENG_NM), CHI_NM = VALUES(CHI_NM), CTZ_NO = VALUES(CTZ_NO), IN_OFFI_YN = VALUES(IN_OFFI_YN), SEX_CD = VALUES(SEX_CD), BIRTH_YMD = VALUES(BIRTH_YMD), HIRE_YMD = VALUES(HIRE_YMD), ANNUAL_CAL_YMD = VALUES(ANNUAL_CAL_YMD), POS_CD = VALUES(POS_CD), DUTY_CD = VALUES(DUTY_CD), JOB_CD = VALUES(JOB_CD), REPREDUTY_CD = VALUES(REPREDUTY_CD), WORK_ORG_CD = VALUES(WORK_ORG_CD), MOD_USER_ID = 1, MOD_DATE = CURDATE()

WITH ordered AS ( SELECT h.*, LAG(h.ORG_CD) OVER (PARTITION BY h.EMP_ID ORDER BY h.STA_YMD, h.CAM_HISTORY_ID) AS prev_org_cd, LAG(h.POS_CD) OVER (PARTITION BY h.EMP_ID ORDER BY h.STA_YMD, h.CAM_HISTORY_ID) AS prev_pos_cd FROM CAM_HISTORY_C h WHERE h.EMP_ID = ? ) SELECT o.CAM_HISTORY_ID, o.STA_YMD, COALESCE(xt.CD_NM, o.TYPE_CD) AS appoint_type, COALESCE(fo.ORG_NM, '') AS from_dept_nm, COALESCE(to_o.ORG_NM, o.ORG_CD) AS to_dept_nm, COALESCE(fp.CD_NM, '') AS from_position, COALESCE(tp.CD_NM, o.POS_CD) AS to_position, COALESCE(o.NOTE, '') AS remark FROM ordered o LEFT JOIN ORM_ORG_C to_o ON o.ORG_CD = to_o.ORG_CD AND to_o.END_YMD = '9999-12-31' LEFT JOIN ORM_ORG_C fo ON o.prev_org_cd = fo.ORG_CD AND fo.END_YMD = '9999-12-31' LEFT JOIN XFRMD2C xt ON o.TYPE_CD = xt.CD AND xt.CD_KIND = 'CAM_TYPE_CD' AND xt.END_YMD = '9999-12-31' LEFT JOIN XFRMD2C tp ON o.POS_CD = tp.CD AND tp.CD_KIND = 'PHM_POS_CD' AND tp.END_YMD = '9999-12-31' LEFT JOIN XFRMD2C fp ON o.prev_pos_cd = fp.CD AND fp.CD_KIND = 'PHM_POS_CD' AND fp.END_YMD = '9999-12-31' ORDER BY o.STA_YMD DESC
